creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to sec from comment #5)

Given the "error is not consistent to trigger" status, of interest
would be:

- FreeBSD-15.0-CURRENT-arm-armv7-GENERICSD-20240919-ce9c3abf69c2-272286 - no issues
How many times did you retry that to conclude that there are no issues overall?

- FreeBSD-13.4-RELEASE-arm-armv7-GENERICSD - no issues
How many times did you retry that to conclude that there are no issues overall?

". . . most likely after fresh reboot": Similarly, how many retries were
tested specifically for this "mostly likely" context for the failure?


Wording question: Are all ssh references implicitly for "from git.freebsd.org"?
